title: [i18n/R3] Formatters: make relative-time and date formatters locale-aware (timeAgo, utils.ts, ActiveAgentsPanel)
description:
## Scope

Make all relative-time and date formatters locale-aware. Currently they are hardcoded to English strings or en-US locale.

## Files to fix

### ui/src/lib/timeAgo.ts (lines 29-44)
Returns hardcoded English suffix strings: `${m}m ago`, `${h}h ago`, `${d}d ago`, `${w}w ago`, `${mo}mo ago`.

**Fix:** Accept a `t` function parameter or locale string, and use i18n keys like `t("time.minutesAgo", { count: m })` with plural support in all 8 locale files.

### ui/src/lib/utils.ts (lines 61-67)
```ts
if (diffSec < 60) return "just now";
if (diffMin < 60) return `${diffMin}m ago`;
if (diffHr < 24)  return `${diffHr}h ago`;
if (diffDay < 30) return `${diffDay}d ago`;
```
Same fix as above.

### ui/src/components/DevRestartBanner.tsx (lines 10-16)
Same relative time pattern — fix inline.

### ui/src/pages/PluginSettings.tsx (lines 1151-1159)
Same relative time pattern — consider extracting to the shared util rather than duplicating.

### ui/src/components/ActiveAgentsPanel.tsx (line 167)
```tsx
isActive ? "Live now" : run.finishedAt ? `Finished ${relativeTime(...)}` : `Started ${relativeTime(...)}`
```
Replace string templates with `t("agents.liveNow")`, `t("agents.finishedAgo", { time: relativeTime(...) })`, `t("agents.startedAgo", { time: relativeTime(...) })`.

### ui/src/lib/utils.ts (lines 32-47) — date formatting
Three helpers use hard-coded `"en-US"` locale:
```ts
toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })
```
Replace with the user's active locale from `i18n.language` (use `useTranslation` hook to get current language, or accept locale as parameter).

## Translation key requirements
Add plural-aware time keys in all 8 locales:
- `time.justNow`, `time.secondsAgo`, `time.minutesAgo`, `time.hoursAgo`, `time.daysAgo`, `time.weeksAgo`, `time.monthsAgo`
- `agents.liveNow`, `agents.finishedAgo`, `agents.startedAgo`

## Acceptance criteria
- "1d ago" renders as "1 день назад" (or equivalent) in Russian
- "just now" renders in Russian
- Date fields use Russian month names when `i18n.language=ru`
- All 8 locales tested and no English fallback strings

ancestors.title: Localization round 3: hunt remaining hardcoded English strings (board-flagged)
ancestors.description: ## Context The board rejected merging the localization branch on [ZAI-138](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-138). They confirmed there is still hardcoded English text visible in the UI when language=Russian. **Do not merge `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` until this is fixed and re-verified.** ## Concrete English strings the board flagged Collected from board screenshots posted on [ZAI-10](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-10) (comments dated 2026-05-06 and 2026-05-07). Use these as **starting points** — the board says they see more, so a full audit is required. ### Dashboard (`/:companyKey/dashboard`) - **`Agents`** — section heading on the dashboard agent panel (should be `Агенты`). - **`Finished 1d ago`** — agent run status label inside agent card (status word + relative time). - **`Critical` / `High` / `Medium` / `Low`** — chart legend labels for "Задачи по приоритету". - **`In Review`** — status label inside "Задачи по статусу" chart legend. - Activity feed event lines, including: - `Boardissue read marked SDF-1—...` → `issue read marked` is English. - `Boardinstance settings general updated` → `instance settings general updated` is English. - `CEOenvironment lease released` → `environment lease released` is English. - `CEOcommented on SDF-1—...` → `commented on` is English. ### Issue properties (`/:companyKey/issues/:identifier`) - **`Properties`** — section heading (should be `Свойства`). - **`Medium`** (priority value) — display label in the Priority property. - **`May 6, 2026`** — date format using English month names (need locale-aware date formatter). - **`1d ago`** — relative time string (need locale-aware formatter). ### Inbox filters dropdown (`/:companyKey/inbox/mine`) - Quick-filter pills: **`All` / `Active` / `Backlog` / `Done`**. - Status column checkboxes: **`In Progress` / `Todo` / `Backlog` / `In Review` / `Blocked` / `Done` / `Cancelled`**. - Visibility column: **`Live runs only`** checkbox label. - Creator search dropdown contains `access_roles.board` — looks like a raw i18n key bleeding through (translation key, not display label). ### Account / header - Agent name rendered as `ceo` (lowercase) inside `ceo` — likely a separate display-name/casing concern rather than i18n, but verify. ## Acceptance criteria 1. All strings listed above render in Russian when `i18n.language=ru`. 2. **Date and relative-time formatters** are locale-aware across all 8 supported locales — not just translated strings (so `1d ago` becomes `1 день назад` in ru, etc.). 3. **Status / priority enums** render via `t()` everywhere they appear (charts, filters, properties, badges) — not via raw enum string interpolation. 4. **Activity feed event templates** render via i18n — there are likely many more event types than the four flagged; audit the full set. 5. A fresh Browser Tester sweep across all 8 locales finds **zero** English text on dashboard, issue detail, inbox, costs, activity, agents, settings, and command palette — submit screenshot evidence per locale. 6. Translation keys exist in **all 8 locale files** (en, ru, de, es, fr, it, pt, zh) with native translations — no English fallbacks for non-en locales. ## Suggested approach 1. **Grep audit first.** Search the UI source for hardcoded user-visible English strings (status enums like `In Progress`, `Todo`, `Backlog`, `Cancelled`; common words like `Finished`, `Properties`, `Critical`, `High`, `Medium`, `Low`, `All`, `Active`, `Done`, `ago`, etc.). Many will be in renderers/formatters, not just JSX literals. 2. Use grep to find string-typed enum displays — e.g. constants tables that map enum values to English labels. 3. Verify date/time formatting uses i18next-aware libraries (e.g. `date-fns/locale`, `Intl.DateTimeFormat` keyed on `i18n.language`, or `react-i18next` formatters). 4. Once strings are wired, hand to Browser Tester (a6ec4085-a4e5-489c-bd10-7c46f8b62e07) for cross-locale screenshot sweep before requesting CEO review. ## Coordination - Route implementation to **Localization Agent** (2c35ae09-781d-4a7c-880b-8abd833fd682) for translation/wiring work. - Route cross-locale verification to **Browser Tester Agent** (a6ec4085-a4e5-489c-bd10-7c46f8b62e07). - CTO owns the rollup; split into bounded child issues per surface (dashboard, issue properties, inbox filters, activity feed, formatters) using `paperclip-converting-plans-to-tasks`. - **Do not request merge of the branch** until acceptance criteria all pass and CEO approves. ZAI-10 stays in `in_review`.

project.name: Localization
project.description:
**Project Goal**

Replace hardcoded English text in UI with localization variables (react-i18next / i18next), while simultaneously ensuring support for two languages: English (en) and Russian (ru). A language switcher dropdown menu is added to the UI, designed according to the project design. The process is executed iteratively by a team of agents until all text elements are fully covered.

**Directory Structure**

```
C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales\
├── en\                         # Translation files — English
├── ru\                         # Translation files — Russian
└── ~temp\
    ├── PROJECT_DESIGN.md
    └── HARDCODED_ENGLISH_ELEMENTS_MAP.md

```

**Localization Library**

react-i18next / i18next — configuration and existing translations are located in: `C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales`

**Agent Roles**

**Developer** — localization developer: replaces hardcode with `t('key')`, maintains `en\` and `ru\` files, implements dropdown menu.

**QA** — browser tester: checks server availability at [`http://127.0.0.1:3105/`](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), searches for unreplaced English strings when Russian language is active, updates MAP file.

**Orchestrator** — monitors the last update date of MAP file; if file is updated — starts new Developer → QA cycle.

**Statuses in MAP File**

| Status         | Set By        | Meaning                                          |
| -------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| TODO           | Browser agent | Found English text, needs localization           |
| DONE           | Developer     | Localization completed, awaiting QA verification |
| TODO + comment | QA            | Checked, found problem, returned to Developer    |
| QA\_OK         | QA            | Checked, everything works correctly              |

**Working Cycle (Loop)**

```
Browser agent → TODO
      ↓
Developer → DONE
      ↓
QA checks DONE
      ↓
  [not OK] → TODO + comment → Developer → DONE → QA...
  [OK]    → QA_OK

```

**Plan**

**Step 1 — Browser agent: audit of visible English elements**

* Opens [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), switches to Russian language.
* Goes through all available screens.
* For each found English text, records in MAP file:
  * full element text
  * HTML element
  * CSS selector
  * status TODO

**Step 2 — Developer: hardcode replacement**

* Takes records with TODO status from MAP file.
* By text, HTML element and CSS selector finds location in codebase.
* Replaces with t('key'), adds translations to en\ and ru.
* Sets status DONE.

**Step 3 — QA: DONE verification**

* Receives signal about appearance of records with DONE status in MAP file.
* First basic check: [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) responds and not black screen. If black screen — cycle stops, Developer fixes.
* Switches to Russian language, checks specific elements from DONE records.
* If problem — changes status back to TODO with comment on what exactly is wrong.
* If everything is correct — sets QA\_OK.

**Step 4 — Iteration**

* Browser agent again goes through all screens searching for remaining English strings.
* New strings → TODO, cycle repeats.
* Orchestrator starts new cycle with each appearance of TODO in MAP file.

**Final Verification (when all records are QA\_OK)**

* QA goes through all records with QA\_OK status — full regression run.
* Checks that previously completed localization hasn't broken during subsequent changes.
* If something broke — record returns to TODO with comment, cycle resumes.
* If everything is fine — project is considered completed.

**Completion Criterion**

All records in MAP file have QA\_OK status, final regression run is passed, server [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) loads stably.

ancestors.title: ответ в http://127.0.0.1:3100/ZAI/issues/ZAI-10
ancestors.description:
1. мёрдж НЕ делаем пока локализация НЕ готова ПОЛНОСТЬЮ, она не готова, есть НЕ переведённые захардкоженные английские слова в коде

   2\. выше в диалоге прислал где я вижу ещё английские тексты, чтобы нашли и сделали локализацию
